title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Embassy Group - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Embassy Group - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Embassy Group has an exciting opening for a Sales Manager at our Amritsar office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Embassy Group:
Embassy Group is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in Title Search

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Professional development and training programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Amritsar, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Embassy Group!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
